name: professional-provenance-resume
description: Source-controlled resume and portfolio publishing system.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-renderer.mjs && node scripts/test-normalize-profile.mjs && node scripts/test-links-renderer.mjs && node scripts/test-portfolio-renderer.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/build-html.mjs && node scripts/build-links.mjs && node scripts/build-portfolio.mjs
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run build && npm run test:generated
scripts.render: node scripts/build-html.mjs && node scripts/build-links.mjs && node scripts/build-portfolio.mjs && node scripts/render-pdf.mjs
